tool.name: skani search
tool.description: query genomes against a pre-built skani sketch database
tool.command: ## Extract the sketch database tar. Handle archives that contain a single ## wrapping directory as well as archives whose contents are at the root. mkdir -p db_extract && tar -xf '$sketch_db' -C db_extract && if [ -f db_extract/index.db ]; then DB_DIR=db_extract; else DB_DIR=\$(find db_extract -mindepth 2 -name index.db -exec dirname {} \; | head -n 1); fi && if [ -z "\$DB_DIR" ]; then echo "Error: could not find a skani sketch database (no index.db found in archive)" >&2; exit 1; fi && skani search -t \${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} -d "\$DB_DIR" @OUTPUT_CMD@ -s $algorithm.s $algorithm.robust $algorithm.median $algorithm.no_learned_ani $algorithm.keep_refs $individual_seqs #if str($n_results).strip() -n $n_results #end if -q #for $q in $queries '$q' #end for -o '$output'

param.name: sketch_db
param.label: Sketch database
param.help: A skani sketch database produced by the 'skani sketch' tool (a tar archive containing index.db, markers.bin, sketches.db).

param.name: queries
param.label: Query genomes
param.help: One or more query FASTA files (gzip accepted).

param.name: individual_seqs
param.label: Treat each query sequence as its own genome
param.help: Use individual sequences in a multi-fasta query as separate genomes.

param.name: n_results
param.label: Maximum results per query
param.help: Limit the number of reference matches reported per query. Leave empty for unlimited.

param.label: Screening identity (%)
param.help: Pairs with approximately less than this percent identity are screened out by k-mer sketching.

param.label: Keep references in memory
param.help: Cache reference sketches in memory once they pass the marker filter. Uses more memory but is much faster when querying many similar sequences.

param.label: Robust mean
param.help: Estimate the mean ANI after trimming the 10%/90% quantiles.

param.label: Use median instead of mean
param.help: Estimate the median identity instead of the mean.

param.label: Disable learned-ANI regression
param.help: Disable the regression model used to predict ANI.

tool.help:
**skani search**
Query one or more genome assemblies against a pre-built skani sketch database. Use this when you want to compare many queries against a fixed reference set -- the sketch database is built once with the *skani sketch* tool and can be re-used for many query runs.
-----
**Inputs**
- A **sketch database** (tar archive) produced by the *skani sketch* tool. - One or more **query** FASTA files (``.fasta`` or ``.fasta.gz``).
-----
**Output**
A tab-separated ANI table in the same format as ``skani dist``:
- ``Ref_file`` / ``Query_file`` -- file paths - ``ANI`` -- average nucleotide identity (%) - ``Align_fraction_ref`` / ``Align_fraction_query`` -- fraction of each genome covered - ``Ref_name`` / ``Query_name`` -- first record id from each file
Enable *Detailed output* to add contig N50s and other per-comparison stats, or *Confidence intervals* to add bootstrap-derived ANI percentiles.
-----
**Tips**
- The sketch parameters (compression factor, marker compression) are baked into the database and cannot be changed at search time. - Enable *Keep references in memory* when querying many similar sequences -- it trades memory for a substantial speedup. - Use the *Maximum results per query* option for "best-hit" style queries when the database is large.
